description: Design UI — Promote flow: Wizard-style flow. Single idea: select or create feature ID → confirm roadmap placement → preview generated `plan.md` → confirm. Cluster merge-and-promote: select 2+ related ideas from same cluster → merge into single feature with combined context → promote as one. Updates ideabox.md, ROADMAP.md, and `roadmap-graph.html` in one operation. Visual confirmation with link to new feature in Graph/Tree view.
